DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string that represents the Git hash for version control.
DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.purpose: Helps developers track changes in the codebase, ensuring players have the latest features and fixes.

DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.mechanism: Records the timestamp of when a dynamic string flag was last updated.
DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.purpose: Informs players about when new features or changes were implemented, enhancing transparency.

FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Uses a fast string representation of the Git hash for quick access.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Improves performance for developers, allowing quicker updates and smoother gameplay for players.

FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Maintains a fast string version of the timestamp for quick retrieval.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Ensures players receive timely updates about changes, improving their overall experience.
